package rulecoverage

func NegativeQueryrowInsideLoopExistenceCheck() string {
    ruleID := "queryrow_inside_loop_existence_check"
    family := "data_access"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "QueryRow(...) or QueryRowContext(...) used inside loops for point lookups that usually want a bulk prefetch path."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
